title: Melania Trump talks Barron, her mother
shortDescription: The famously private first lady Melania Trump offered USA TODAY a glimpse behind the curtain of her role as a mother and daughter.

title: Trump says he expects Iran response on peace talks soon
shortDescription: The president told reporters he expected a response as soon as Friday evening. The White House did not answer questions about whether the response had been received yet.

title: GOP infighting in Congress slows Trump agenda as midterms loom
shortDescription: If you ask Speaker Mike Johnson, he's working miracles on Capitol Hill with a historically small House majority. Still, dysfunction reigns.

title: Ukraine, Russia confirm 3-day ceasefire as Trump hopes for 'big extension'
shortDescription: The Ukraine-Russia ceasefire would include a suspension of all "kinetic activity" and a swap of 1,000 prisoners from each country, President Trump said.

title: FBI questions Wisconsin election official about 2020 presidential vote
shortDescription: A Federal Bureau of Investigation agent interviewed a high-ranking state election official in recent weeks about the 2020 presidential election.

title: 'The View' probe sparks First Amendment legal filings by ABC
shortDescription: After months of probing into 'The View,' ABC News has filed a complaint against the FCC, saying it violated the network's First Amendment rights.

title: Can Trump's tough-guy approach work with Iran?
shortDescription: Wars are easier to start than end. A look at the hard truth Trump is facing in Iran.

title: Experts say Trump 'not prepared' for pandemic
shortDescription: Infectious disease experts are sounding the alarm on the Trump administration's preparedness for a pandemic after significant cuts to the CDC.

title: Trump news and updates for May 8 from the Trump Connect reporter
shortDescription: Trump called strikes on Iran yesterday a “trifle.” He drove over the empty Reflecting Pool in his motorcade. GOP gains ground in redistricting battle.

title: Trump-backed challengers topple Indiana GOP incumbents
shortDescription: Indiana primaries reveal Trump still dominates the GOP as anti-Trump Republicans face backlash at the ballot.

title: Democrats take two major hits in House map fight
shortDescription: Democrats are facing redistricting setbacks after a Virginia Supreme Court ruling and a newly approved Tennessee congressional map.

title: Trump once declared May 8 a holiday. Is it?
shortDescription: President Donald Trump once said May 8 is a "very important holiday." Why don't we get it off?

title: Trump takes a drive through reflecting pool to see renovation progress
shortDescription: When a reporter asked President Trump about the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool renovations, he said: “I want to keep our country beautiful and safe.”

title: Does Charlize Theron support Trump? See her past comment on immigration
shortDescription: A fake picture has popped up recently of Charlize Theron and Donald Trump. Does the 'Apex' and 'Bombshell' actress support Donald Trump?

title: Trump turns reflecting pool into driveway
shortDescription: President Trump's motorcade drove through drained reflecting pool during renovation.

title: In seismic blow to Democrats, Virginia Supreme Court overturns new map
shortDescription: The Virginia Supreme Court struck down a new voter-approved map that would give Democrats an edge in the midterm elections.
